description: You are a Security Engineer hardening a network diagnostic microservice located at '~/projects/net-monitor/'. Apply the Principle of Least Privilege by reconfiguring the 'net-monitor' service to run as the non-root user 'monitor' (UID 1000). The configuration must drop all default capabilities and add only the specific capabilities required for binding port 80 (NET_BIND_SERVICE) and sending ICMP packets (NET_RAW). Ensure the service remains functional and responds correctly to 'curl http://localhost:80' and 'curl http://localhost:80/ping?target=127.0.0.1'. Login: user 'ga', password 'password123'.
